name: provana-ado
description: Azure DevOps MCP server and workflow skills for Provana engineering teams

ado-work-items.description: Azure DevOps work items — creating, updating, linking to PRs, sprint planning, queries. Use when managing backlog, creating tasks, updating status, or planning sprints in Azure DevOps.

ado-repositories.description: Azure DevOps repos — PR creation, branch policies, code review workflow, Provana branching conventions. Use when creating PRs, reviewing code, or working with ADO Git repos.

azure_devops.description: Azure DevOps MCP server — org: provanadev. Provides tools for work items, repositories, pipelines, and core project operations. Authentication handled by user (Azure CLI or PAT).
